title: GShattering Celery Smoky Pilaf
description: A show-off Japanese dish featuring celery, katsuramuki-cut, in a smoky flavor profile, halal-friendly and suitable for all occasions.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix rice with soy sauce and shichimi togarashi. Stir well until evenly coated.
Add katsuramuki-cut celery and sesame seeds on top of the rice mixture. Mix gently to distribute.
Transfer the mixture into a greased baking dish. Bake for 20 minutes.
Remove from oven, reduce heat to 350 degrees F, and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes until golden brown.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
